description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set within a rectangular fenced lot, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The property includes a detached garage at the front, a driveway, and a secure gate, with manicured green lawns surrounding the main structure. The backyard boasts a wooden deck with outdoor seating, a swimming pool, and a shaded patio area, providing ample space for relaxation and entertainment. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically along the exterior, maximizing natural light and offering views of the garden and pool. The perimeter is enclosed by a tall, white fence with greenery for privacy. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, open spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, detached garage, wooden deck, pool, and large windows, all enclosed by a white fence and lush greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, detached garage, and main entrance with a white fence and manicured lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive wooden deck, large windows, and backyard seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, shaded patio, and open green space behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage, driveway, and a clear look at the pool and deck area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, no steps, a covered porch, and a secure gate integrated into the front fence.
